nasb.text: They came to the sons of Reuben and to the sons of Gad and to the half-tribe of Manasseh, to the land of Gilead, and they spoke with them saying,

esv.text: And they came to the people of Reuben, the people of Gad, and the half-tribe of Manasseh, in the land of Gilead, and they said to them,

cnv.text: 他們去到基列地，流本人、迦得人和瑪拿西半個支派的人那裡，對他們說：

ccb.text: 他们来到基列的吕便、迦得和玛拿西半个支派的人那里，对他们说：
